activities_projects.title: Analysing the Impact of Tourism on Natural Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Critically examine the positive and negative effects of tourism on natural wonders
steps: Read about the natural wonders described in the chapter
Research how tourism affects places like the Valley of Flowers
List both advantages and disadvantages of tourism
Write an analytical paragraph suggesting ways to manage tourism responsibly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking about sustainable tourism
activities_projects.evaluation: Depth of analysis and practical solutions suggested (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Environmental Sustainability Case Study
activities_projects.objective: Evaluate how traditional practices contribute to environmental sustainability
steps: Study the section about Living Root Bridges
Research how these bridges are created and maintained
Compare them with modern bridge construction methods
Prepare a short report highlighting sustainability benefits
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand sustainable engineering and indigenous knowledge
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of comparison and research findings (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Debate – Natural Wonders vs Man-made Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Develop argumentation and critical discussion skills
steps: Divide the class into two groups
One group supports natural wonders as more valuable
The other group argues for man-made wonders
Conduct a structured debate and present supporting examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen reasoning and public speaking skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Strength of arguments and teamwork (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Geographical Analysis Project
activities_projects.objective: Understand the geographical conditions that create natural wonders
steps: Identify the geographical features of Uttarakhand and Meghalaya
Explain how climate, terrain, and biodiversity influence these wonders
Write a detailed explanation with examples
Present your findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students connect geography with environmental phenomena

activities_projects.title: Critical Vocabulary and Context Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Analyse how descriptive vocabulary enhances understanding of natural wonders
steps: Identify descriptive words used in the chapter such as 'mystifying', 'spectacle', and 'exotic'
Explain their contextual meaning in the passage
Rewrite the paragraph replacing these words with synonyms
Discuss how the tone changes with new vocabulary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students analyse language use and tone in descriptive writing
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of analysis and vocabulary usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Travel Blog Writing
activities_projects.objective: Develop advanced descriptive and narrative writing skills
steps: Imagine visiting one of the wonders mentioned in the chapter
Write a travel blog describing your journey and experiences
Include sensory details and observations
Suggest tips for future visitors
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students enhance creative writing and storytelling abilities
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, detail, and coherence of writing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Environmental Awareness Campaign
activities_projects.objective: Promote environmental responsibility through collaborative work
steps: Research environmental threats to natural wonders
Create awareness materials such as posters or slogans
Design a campaign encouraging conservation
Present the campaign strategy to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop leadership and environmental awareness
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity and effectiveness of campaign ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparative Research on World Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Analyse similarities and differences between global natural wonders
steps: Choose one natural wonder from India and one from another country
Research their geographical and environmental characteristics
Compare their formation, significance, and tourism impact
Prepare a comparative report
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students broaden global knowledge and analytical skills
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of research and comparison (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Problem-Solving Scenario – Protecting Natural Wonders
activities_projects.objective: Develop problem-solving skills related to environmental protection
steps: Imagine a natural wonder is facing environmental damage
Identify possible causes such as pollution or climate change
Propose practical conservation solutions
Write a detailed action plan
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to apply environmental knowledge to real-world problems
activities_projects.evaluation: Feasibility and creativity of solutions (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Multimedia Presentation – Wonders of India
activities_projects.objective: Develop research, digital literacy, and presentation skills
steps: Choose two spectacular wonders from India
Collect images, facts, and historical details
Create a multimedia presentation explaining their significance
Present the project to the class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students integrate technology with research and communication
activities_projects.evaluation: Content quality, visual presentation, and delivery (10 marks)
